name: Elara Vance
description: A fresh-faced young woman with rich copper-red curls styled in a soft, voluminous bob framing her jawline. Her luminous skin features natural freckles across the nose and cheeks, complemented by subtle studio makeup that enhances her green-hazel eyes. Captured in both front and clean side profile, her look is calm, confident, and highly versatile. Styled in a minimal white tank top against a seamless white studio background, she embodies modern beauty casting standards with strong facial structure and excellent symmetry, ideal for high-end beauty, skincare, and AI-driven editorial workflows.

profile.overall_look: minimal styling, clean background, strong presence
